mapper.insert: insert into projects_biz (id, tenant_id, name, country, sector, languages, codebook, odk_project_id, odk_project_uuid, odk_xml_form_id, status, created_by, created_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{name}, #{country}, #{sector}, #{languages}, CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(#{codebook}, ''), '{}') AS jsonb), #{odkProjectId}, #{odkProjectUuid}, #{odkXmlFormId}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, current_timestamp)
mapper.update: update projects_biz set name = #{name}, country = #{country}, sector = #{sector}, languages = #{languages}, codebook = CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(#{codebook}, ''), '{}') AS jsonb), odk_project_id = #{odkProjectId}, odk_project_uuid = #{odkProjectUuid}, odk_xml_form_id = #{odkXmlFormId}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from projects_biz where id = #{projectId} and deleted_at is null
select * from projects_biz where deleted_at is null order by created_at desc
select * from projects_biz where deleted_at is not null order by deleted_at desc
mapper.update: update projects_biz set deleted_at = null, deleted_by = null where id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: insert into project_forms (id, project_id, template_name, version, uploaded_at) values (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{templateName}, #{version}, #{uploadedAt})
insert into project_integrations (id, project_id, type, payload) values (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{type}, #{payload})
mapper.select: select * from form_templates order by name
